description: Set's the persistent field of the provided Instance slot upon calling * (Call).

fields.Instance: Slot to set the property for.
fields.Persistent: The value to set Instance (Slot)'s persistent field to.
fields.Next: Sends an impulse when Instance (Slot)'s persistent field is set to Persistent (bool) when * (Call) is called.

notes.title: * ([[Impulses|Call]])
notes.text: Call this to set the Instance (Slot)'s persistent field to Persistent (bool).
